titleStmt.title: SII 41.85: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 85. (A.R. No. 84 of 1905.) Tiruttarakōsamaṅgai, Ramnad Taluk, Ramnad District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa of the Maṅgalēśvara temple at Tiruttarakōsamaṅgai.

p.hi: Tañjāvūr Nāyaka. Achchutappa-nāyaka, son of Sevvappa-nāyaka. Śaka 1505, Chittirabhānu, Vaigāsi, Purva 5, Monday = 1582 March.

summary.p: Gift of a village, Chāttaṉūr near Tirukkaḷāchchēri in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam, by the king to Nayiṉārmaṅgaipperumāḷ temple at Tiruvuttarakōsamaṅgai in Chembi-nāḍu, for renovation and worship.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakābtam1000 5 100 5 ṉmel
cellāniṉṟa cittirapānu varuṣam vaikā
ci mātam 10 5§ pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum coma
vāramum Uttira nakṣattiṟamum peṟṟa
Iṟṟaiṉāḷ cevvappaṉāyakkar Accutappa
nāyakkar śrīrāmasetuvil Amāvā
sya puṇṇiyakālattu cempiṉāṭṭu
śrītecam tiruvuttarakocamaṅkai
uṭaiyanayiṉār maṅkaipperumāḷ
nayiṉār koyil pūcaitiruppaṇikku
viṭṭa kirāmamāvatu coḻamaṇṭala
ttil tirukkiḷāccerikku Arukāṇ
maiyāṉa cāttaṉūrāṉa tiruñāṉacam
paṉta nallūrāṉatil Iṉṉāṉ kel
kaikku Uṭpaṭṭa celanetipāṣāṇa
m maṟṟum Eṟpayappaṭṭa camattappi
ṟāttiyum caṟuvamāṉṉiyam Iṟaiyiliyā
ka Āticaṉtirātittiyavaṟc celvatāka kal
lilum cempilum veṭṭik kaiyāḷak
kaṭavarākavum Itukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavar
keṅkaikkaraiyilum cetumūlattilum karām
pacuvaiyum pirammakattiyum ceyta toṣa
ttile pokakaṭavarākavum śubhamastu§
Digital edition of SII 41.85 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
